---
title: "Testfile"
author: "Kyle Urban"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Loading packages
```{r warning=F, message=F}
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
DATA <- read_csv("Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset.csv")

DATA
```
